page: Microsoft Azure D2s_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the Dsv6 server family. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 8573C processor with an x86_64 architecture, operating at a clock speed of 4.2 GHz. The instance features 2 dedicated vCPUs derived from 1 physical core with hyper-threading, providing 2 threads per core. It is equipped with 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This virtual machine does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, but it is premium storage capable, relying on network-attached storage for disk operations.

Performance benchmarks reveal strong single-core capabilities, with a Geekbench single-core score of 2116.0 and a single-threaded gzip compression rate of 31.33 GB/sec. However, multi-core and memory bandwidth metrics are relatively weak. The stress-ng multi-core CPU performance is registered at 1991.89, and the Geekbench multi-core score is 2631.0. Memory bandwidth tests show 20.8 GB/sec for large-block read-only operations and 14.3 GB/sec for large-block write operations, reflecting the resource constraints of a 2-vCPU configuration.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the D2s_v6 offers a low-cost entry point into dedicated Intel Xeon compute resources without the variable performance associated with burstable instances. Due to its limited core count and memory capacity, it is best suited for lightweight workloads such as basic web serving, single-threaded text processing, small-scale database operations, or development and testing environments that do not require high multi-threaded throughput or massive memory bandwidth.
description: Microsoft Azure D2s_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the Dsv6 family, powered by a 4.2 GHz Intel Xeon 8573C processor. It features 2 dedicated vCPUs and 8.0 GB of RAM, with no local storage or GPUs. Benchmarks show strong single-core performance, highlighted by a Geekbench single-core score of 2116.0 and high single-threaded gzip compression speeds. Conversely, multi-core and memory bandwidth metrics are weak, with a Geekbench multi-core score of 2631.0 and uncached read bandwidth of 20.8 GB/sec. This instance provides a cost-effective, predictable entry point for workloads that favor single-threaded execution over parallel processing. It is best suited for lightweight applications, basic web serving, text processing, and development environments.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D2s_v6 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 2 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM, and strong single-core performance, suitable for lightweight web serving and development workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D2s_v6 is a general-purpose VM with 2 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 8.0 GB of RAM, optimized for lightweight single-threaded workloads.
tagline: A dedicated dual-core Intel Xeon virtual machine delivering strong single-threaded performance for lightweight general-purpose workloads.

2 dedicated vCPUs and 8.0 GB of system memory
Strong single-core performance with weak multi-core scaling
No local storage; premium remote storage capable
